info.name: Tournament API's
info.description:
## 👋 Introduction

Welcome to the Tournament API development workspace. This workspace serves as a single source of truth for the APIs we build for Tournament App.

## 🚀 Getting started with this workspace

API Base Url (BASE_URL) for development: [http://localhost:5001/api](http://localhost:4000/api)

API Base Url (BASE_URL) for production:

item.name: Authentication

request.description: The API endpoint to sign up and login via Google
The API endpoint to sign up and login via Apple
The API endpoint to complete the user Sign Up process for the very first time

item.description:
## 🚀 Getting started with the Authentication process

  
The following folders will show up the API's used in the system to implement Authtication and Authorization.  
The system is using JSON WEB TOKEN and BEREAR token format to validate the HTTP (Local machine) and HTTPS (Live Server) requests.

item.name: Profile

request.description:
# Expected Respones:

- { status: 200, message: "Profile deleted", code: "PROFIEL_DELETED, error: false }

item.description: The folder/directory to for all the user's Profile API's.

request.description:
# Expected Respones:

- { status: 400, clubs: CLUBS_DATA, pagination: { total, page, limitm totalPages }, code: "CLUB_FETCHED, error: false }
